expectations.evidence: create_skill.py to_kebab() converts 'log-analyzer' → 'log-analyzer' (already valid). Folder created as log-analyzer/, not log_analyzer/.

expectations.text: Includes SKILL.md as a required file
expectations.evidence: create_skill.py creates skill_dir / 'SKILL.md' as the first file. spec.md: 'SKILL.md — required'.

expectations.text: Includes CHANGELOG.md with at least a [1.0.0] placeholder
expectations.evidence: create_skill.py now generates CHANGELOG.md with a dated [1.0.0] entry. This was the key fix from skill-making.

expectations.text: Does NOT include a README.md inside the skill folder
expectations.evidence: create_skill.py no longer generates README.md. spec.md: 'No README.md inside the skill folder. READMEs go at repo root.' This was removed from the old skill-making create_skill.py.

expectations.text: SKILL.md frontmatter includes name, description, and metadata fields
expectations.evidence: create_skill.py SKILL.md template now generates full YAML frontmatter with name, description, compatibility, and metadata (author, version, category, tags). The old skill-making version generated no frontmatter at all.

expectations.text: If scripts/ is included, files are placed under scripts/ not at skill root
expectations.evidence: create_skill.py creates the script at skill_dir / 'scripts' / f'{skill_name.replace("-", "_")}.py' — correct placement under scripts/.
